name: repo-sca-vuln
description: A Python requirements.txt pinning known-vulnerable dependency versions (Django 2.2.0, PyYAML 5.1, Jinja2 2.10, urllib3 1.24.1, requests 2.19.0). The SCA tools (trivy fs / grype / osv-scanner) must surface their well-known CVEs — the repository asset's runnable, no-download SCA benchmark (the OWASP-Benchmark SAST fixture needs a heavy source clone).

competitors.leaderboard: Snyk / Dependabot / Trivy — self-published only (no neutral SCA leaderboard)
competitors.note: SCA recall is measured against a curated must-find CVE set drawn from the exact pinned dependency versions in requirements.txt: CVE-2020-1747 (PyYAML 5.1 arbitrary code execution), CVE-2018-18074 (requests 2.19.0 credential leak on redirect), CVE-2019-11236 (urllib3 1.24.1 CRLF injection), CVE-2019-10906 (Jinja2 2.10 sandbox escape). Each is detected by multiple SCA tools, so recall is robust to a single tool's DB drift.
